title: Kielty
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Kielty''''' was a pair of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] that received cargo from the new Alliance members, the [[Habassa]], who delievered it with freighters called ''[[Starmover]]''.

During that time, the freighters were attacked by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Anjisan]]'' but [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] warded off her attacks until the transfer was done.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
